final_prompt.prompt:
Edit the uploaded image (#1: athletic woman kitchen).

Style/medium: photorealistic
Composition: preserve original composition and overall layout completely unchanged
Subject:
  Athletic woman — identity, facial structure, expression, body posture, clothing, and accessories must remain completely unchanged
  Do not modify, reinterpret, replace, or add any new visual elements
Scene/backdrop: kitchen environment — preserve exactly as-is
Lighting/mood: balanced studio-grade lighting, enhanced dynamic range, contrast, and three-dimensionality
Color palette:
Materials/textures:
  Reconstruct microscopic details: accurate facial contours, realistic skin texture with naturally visible pores, clear individual hair strands, sharp and realistic eyes, clean crisp edges
Text (verbatim):
Constraints:
  All elements — character identity, scene, composition, layout — must remain completely unchanged
  Only reconstruct and optimize fine details; no new elements added
Avoid: any modification, reinterpretation, or replacement of existing visual elements
